leadText: The Lone Earring (Japanese: かたっぽピアス Lone Earring) is a valuable item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Lone Earring serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A single earring that somebody dropped.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A lone earring. Its sparkle probably inspired your Buddy Pokémon to gift it to you!
